title: aeluropus lagopoides var. repens
intro: Aeluropus lagopoides var. repens, also known as the 'Creeping Saltwort', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aeluropus lagopoides var. repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the treatment of various digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, as well as topical creams or ointments for external applications.
